subcodes.first_line: Inherent knowledge belongeth exclusively unto the True One - that is, unto the Ancient Beauty, the Most Great Name, Who hath no partner in this attribute - even as essential light is a distinctive quality of the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علم ذاتی مختصّ به حقّ است يعنی جمال قدم اسم اعظم ليس له شريک فی ذلک چنانکه نور ذاتی از خصائص شمس است
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
